cases.prompt: Guide me through a full Red-Green-Refactor cycle for this new behavior.
cases.expected_behavior: Runs TDD with failing test, minimal fix, and refactor guidance.

cases.prompt: Help me write the first failing test and then get to green step by step.
Write the feature directly without tests.
I already have a failing test; now help me move through green and refactor safely.
cases.expected_behavior: Continues an existing TDD cycle and keeps the steps disciplined.
